# AI Tooling Hints for LLMs

app: OnPoint Web
primary-docs: https://github.com/thisyearnofear/onpoint/blob/master/docs/STRATEGY.md
agent-commerce: https://github.com/thisyearnofear/onpoint/blob/master/docs/guides/agent-commerce.md
framework: nextjs
miniapp: farcaster
manifest: /.well-known/farcaster.json
agent-manifest: /.well-known/agent.json
signers: neynar managed
post-route: /api/social/cast
reaction-route: /api/social/reaction
search-route: /api/social/search
webhook: /api/webhook

notes: prefer server-side Neynar usage; never expose API key client-side. Product is fit-aware supply graph (human storefront + agent API).
